map.searchPlaceholder: Search by postal code or city…
map.noBusinesses: No businesses with coordinates found. Add lat and lng to the contact block in a company's showcase file.
map.clickToInteract: Click to interact with the map

join.lead: Toffe Kerels is not an open platform. It's a tight circle of professionals who know, trust, and vouch for each other. Want to be part of it?

company.desc: Put your company on the map — literally. Your business gets a full profile in the showcase and a pin on the member map. This tier also includes 1 personal account for one person at your company.
company.perk1: Full company profile in the showcase
company.note: The included personal account gives that person all the benefits of the Person tier: their own profile, BBQ invite, and access to exclusive meetups.

individual.desc: A personal membership for an individual. You get your own profile in the showcase and access to all community events. Note: this tier does not include a business listing or a pin on the map — that's part of the Company tier.
individual.perk1: Own personal profile in the showcase
individual.perk3: Access to exclusive meetups throughout the year
individual.perk5: No business listing or map pin (Company tier required for that)

supporter.desc: Believe in what Toffe Kerels stands for? Support the community and get access to exclusive content available only to supporters.
supporter.perk1: Access to members-only content on the platform
supporter.perk2: You help keep the community running

vetting.title: How does admission work?
vetting.intro: Toffe Kerels is not a platform you can just sign up for. We know everyone personally, and we want to keep it that way.
vetting.step1Desc: You apply via the button above. We receive your request and get in touch.
vetting.step2Desc: We schedule a short conversation to see if there's a connection. Not an interview, just a good chat.
vetting.step3Desc: We screen your background and reputation. Only people we can wholeheartedly recommend are admitted.
vetting.step4Desc: After acceptance, a grace period applies. During this time you get to know the community and we get to know you. Only then do you become a full member.

tierExplainer.title: How do the tiers relate to each other?
tierExplainer.intro: Not sure which tier fits you? Here's a quick overview.
tierExplainer.companyText: For businesses that want to be visible. Your company gets a full profile in the showcase and a pin on the member map. The Company tier also includes 1 personal account — so one person at your company automatically gets all the benefits of the Person tier.
tierExplainer.personText: For individuals who want to be part of the community. You get your own profile in the showcase, an invite to the annual BBQ, and access to exclusive meetups. Important: the Person tier does not include a business listing or a spot on the map. For that, you need the Company tier.
tierExplainer.supporterText: You believe in what Toffe Kerels stands for, but you're not (yet) looking for a profile or active membership. As a supporter you get access to members-only content on the platform and help keep the community running.

quiz.title: Not sure which tier fits you?
quiz.desc: Answer a few quick questions and we'll point you in the right direction.
quiz.resultDesc: Based on your answers, the following tier fits you best:
quiz.q1: Do you own a business or are you self-employed?
quiz.q1b: No, I'm employed or a private individual
quiz.q2: Do you want your business to be visible on the member map and in the showcase?
quiz.q2a: Yes, visibility for my business is important
quiz.q2b: No, I want to be visible myself, not my business
quiz.q2c: I just want to follow the community, no profile
quiz.q3: How many people from your company do you want to register?
quiz.q4: What is your main goal at Toffe Kerels?
quiz.q4a: Find new clients or partners for my business
quiz.q4c: Support the community and follow exclusive content
quiz.q5: Do you want to be invited to the annual BBQ and exclusive meetups?
quiz.q5c: No, I'd rather just follow content
quiz.q6a: I want to profile my business and actively participate
quiz.q6b: I want to profile myself and actively participate
quiz.q6c: I want to support the community without being an active member
quiz.q7: What is your budget for an annual membership?
quiz.q7a: €1,000 per year is fine for the visibility I'm looking for
quiz.q7c: €25 per year is what I want to contribute
quiz.resultCompanyDesc: You want to put your business on the map. With the Company tier you get a full company profile in the showcase, a pin on the member map, warm referrals and 1 personal account for someone at your company.
quiz.resultIndividualDesc: You want to profile yourself and be part of the community. With the Person tier you get your own profile in the showcase, an invite to the annual BBQ, and access to exclusive meetups.
quiz.resultSupporterDesc: You believe in what Toffe Kerels stands for and want to support the community. As a supporter you get access to members-only content on the platform, without being an active member.

join.ctaDesc: Send us a message. We respond within 2 business days.

I would like to apply for the {plan} plan.

Please feel free to contact me to discuss the next steps.

footer.description: Showcase for the coolest companies in the region. We build modern applications that stand out.
